raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Team dynamics insight","name":"How do you feel about the current team dynamics and your place within the team?","description":"Explores James's perception of team connection and potential relational issues.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Motivation drivers","name":"What aspects of your role are currently the most motivating for you?","description":"Identifies what keeps James engaged and invested in his now?","description":"Investigates how the manager can better support James's work and growth","name":"What skills or experiences are you looking to develop next?","description":"Explores James's personal growth ambitions and future learning goals.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Priority alignment","name":"Do you feel your current priorities align with the team's goals?","description":"Checks if James sees his work as aligned with the broader team vision.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Role clarity","name":"Where do you currently feel unclear about what's expected of you?","description":"Surfaces areas where James might lack clarity in his role or tasks.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Long-term view","name":"Where do you see your role evolving in the next year?","description":"Probes James's recently?","description":"Assesses James's ability to maintain a sustainable balance between work and personal life.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Engagement shifts","name":"Have you noticed any shifts in your engagement with work recently?","description":"Explores any recent changes in how James engages with his work.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]}]}
